2 AND 03
3 AND 14
4 AND 25
5 AND 36
6 AND 47
7 AND 50

Applying to 11000101
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 C 0n = NOT(1) = 0
1 C 1n = NOT(1) = 0
2 AND 03 = AND(I 0,I 3) = AND(1,0) = 0
3 AND 14 = AND(I 1,I 4) = AND(1,0) = 0
4 AND 25 = AND(I 2,I 5) = AND(0,1) = 0
5 AND 36 = AND(I 3,I 6) = AND(0,0) = 0
6 AND 47 = AND(I 4,I 7) = AND(0,1) = 0
7 AND 50 = AND(I 5,I 0) = AND(1,1) = 1

\boxed{00000001}
